headline: Coca-Cola (NYSE:KO) Surprises With Q1 CY2026 Sales
summary: Beverage company Coca-Cola (NYSE:KO) reported Q1 CY2026 results beating Wall Street’s revenue expectations, with sales up 11.2% year on year to $12.47 billion. Its non-GAAP profit of $0.86 per share was 5.9% above analysts’ consensus estimates.

content.title: Coca-Cola (NYSE:KO) Surprises With Q1 CY2026 Sales
content.summary: Beverage company Coca-Cola (NYSE:KO) reported Q1 CY2026 results beating Wall Street’s revenue expectations, with sales up 11.2% year on year to $12.47 billion. Its non-GAAP profit of $0.86 per share was 5.9% above analysts’ consensus estimates.

headline: Coca-Cola Reports First Quarter 2026 Results and Updates Full Year Guidance
summary: ATLANTA, April 28, 2026--The Coca-Cola Company today reported first quarter 2026 results. "We’ve had a strong start to the year," said Henrique Braun, CEO of The Coca-Cola Company. "Our performance this quarter reflects our unwavering focus on staying close to the consumer, executing locally and managing complexity. Yet there’s so much more we can do as we navigate a dynamic environment. Our team is motivated by the opportunity to build on the company’s great foundation."

content.title: Coca-Cola Reports First Quarter 2026 Results and Updates Full Year Guidance
content.summary: ATLANTA, April 28, 2026--The Coca-Cola Company today reported first quarter 2026 results. "We’ve had a strong start to the year," said Henrique Braun, CEO of The Coca-Cola Company. "Our performance this quarter reflects our unwavering focus on staying close to the consumer, executing locally and managing complexity. Yet there’s so much more we can do as we navigate a dynamic environment. Our team is motivated by the opportunity to build on the company’s great foundation."

headline: Stocks That Pay You While You Sleep
summary: Dividend income keeps flowing whether you are working, sleeping, or on vacation. headline: Coca-Cola (KO) Q1 2026 Earnings Transcript
summary: This morning, I will provide the perspective on the global operating landscape before diving into our business performance.  During the quarter, the external environment differed greatly across our market.  Excluding the impact from 6 extra days in the quarter and the timing of concentrate shipments, organic revenue growth is on track with our full year guidance.

content.title: Coca-Cola (KO) Q1 2026 Earnings Transcript
content.summary: This morning, I will provide the perspective on the global operating landscape before diving into our business performance.  During the quarter, the external environment differed greatly across our market.  Excluding the impact from 6 extra days in the quarter and the timing of concentrate shipments, organic revenue growth is on track with our full year guidance.

headline: Coca-Cola Leads Dow Jones After Earnings Top Views, But This Worries Executives
summary: Coca-Cola shares gapped above a buy point after the soda giant beat first-quarter expectations.  The stock is the top performer Tuesday in the Dow Jones Industrial Average.  The world's largest soft drink company reported a 12% increase in sales to $12.5 billion, accelerating from a range of 1% to 7% in the previous four quarters.

headline: Warren Buffett Owns 3 Strong Buy Dividend Aristocrat Giants—1 for Almost 40 Years
summary: Warren Buffett stepped down as chief executive of Berkshire Hathaway (NYSE: BRK-B) on December 31, 2025, after six decades leading the conglomerate he transformed from a struggling textile mill into a $1 trillion empire. The “Oracle of Omaha” left his successor, Greg Abel, with a very concentrated portfolio: more than 65% of Berkshire’s $381 billion portfolio ... headline: Coca-Cola raises full-year outlook, prices push sales growth
summary: It's not just a busy week for Big Tech giants, but for consumer-facing companies as well, with United Parcel Service (UPS), Hilton Worldwide Holdings (HLT), Coca-Cola (KO), General Motors (GM), and Kimberly-Clark (KMB) reporting earnings results before Tuesday's open. Yahoo Finance Executive Editor Brian Sozzi speaks with Senior Reporter Brooke DiPalma about Coca-Cola's first quarter earnings release, as the food and beverage company raised its full-year outlook.

content.title: Coca-Cola raises full-year outlook, prices push sales growth
content.description:
It's not just a busy week for Big Tech giants, but for consumer-facing companies as well, with United Parcel Service (UPS), Hilton Worldwide Holdings (HLT), Coca-Cola (KO), General Motors (GM), and Kimberly-Clark (KMB) reporting earnings results before Tuesday's open.

Yahoo Finance Executive Editor Brian Sozzi speaks with Senior Reporter Brooke DiPalma about Coca-Cola's first quarter earnings release, as the food and beverage company raised its full-year outlook.
content.summary: It's not just a busy week for Big Tech giants, but for consumer-facing companies as well, with United Parcel Service (UPS), Hilton Worldwide Holdings (HLT), Coca-Cola (KO), General Motors (GM), and Kimberly-Clark (KMB) reporting earnings results before Tuesday's open. Yahoo Finance Executive Editor Brian Sozzi speaks with Senior Reporter Brooke DiPalma about Coca-Cola's first quarter earnings release, as the food and beverage company raised its full-year outlook.
